signal.text: Ce mois de juin 2026, le digest recense 3 articles. Thématique dominante : PHARMA (3 articles). Sources les plus actives : Gut Microbes, Eur J Med Chem, New Microbes New Infect. 3 publications académiques incluses.

articles.title: Gene-level gut microbiome signatures as predictive biomarkers for response to immune checkpoint inhibitors across multiple cancer types
articles.summary: 1. Gut Microbes. 2026 Dec 31;18(1):2662690. doi: 10.1080/19490976.2026.2662690. Epub 2026 Apr 23. articles.title: Artificial intelligence at the frontlines: Emerging infectious and parasitic diseases in the digital era
